title: Client Commands
description: Enhance your Minecraft gameplay with 30 powerful client-side commands.
body:
![Description Image - Client Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c0d8e7b527f73c3536f03461e300e67f0fa5073_0.webp)

**Client Command** adds powerful, lightweight **client-side commands** to Minecraft, giving you quick access to common settings without opening menus.
All commands run **entirely on the client**, require **no server permissions**, and are designed to be fast, safe, and easy to use.

Perfect for players who want better control over graphics, performance, and much more customization directly from chat.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

![Feature Image Title - Client Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6349e5f4a7eab7b158d764183db5454ac03e78e9_0.webp)
* No server installation required.
* Instant setting changes via from commands.
* Lightweight and performance-friendly.
* Persistent configuration (saved between launches).

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

![Command Image - Client Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6631a61504c5f20acc5d7520c601269d4501361_0.webp)
| ───────────── Command ─────────────    | ───────────── Description ─────────────                                        
| -------------------------------------- | -----------------------------------------------|
| `$setting-fov`                         | Change your field of view (FOV) instantly          |
| `$setting-render-distance`             | Modify render distance without opening settings    |
| `$setting-simulation-distance`         | Adjust simulation distance on the fly              |
| `$setting-graphics`                    | Switch graphics mode (Fast / Fancy / Fabulous)     |
| `$setting-fps`                         | Set max FPS or disable the limit                   |
| `$setting-vsync`                       | Enable or disable VSync                            |
| `$discord-webhook`                             | Save, show, and send messages to a Discord webhook |
| `Many More...`                           | Explore Ingame :)

> All commands use a customizable prefix and work entirely on the client.

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

![Config Image - Client Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d2242d07b45d12e784935850fc9161bb025912a_0.webp)
* All modifications can be done from inside Minecraft. For example: `$webhook set <Your_Webhook_Url>`.
* All settings are stored safely in `.minecraft/config/command/setting.json`.
* If you modify config from file, Changes will happen after game restarts!

![Blank Image - Client Command Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0899e72f12e4b786993998bf42b30329c084e2d8_0.webp)

![Copyright Image - Client Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11648a29f23849bb3e2c735c95f3428ba10b49a8_0.webp)
